title: LagAttack
description: A lightweight vanilla improving modpack for the newest version of minecraft. You can use this modpack to play on the "LagAttack" Server
body:
![Never Gonna Give You Up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zdcGdgak/images/4510d0ca660adcbaf7dc1be33c1a3c7702e7a025.png)
-
👋 Welcome to LagAttack!
-
**LagAttack** was developed specifically for the official LagAttack server and combines beautiful visuals and buttery-smooth performance, optimized for multiplayer survival gameplay.

⚙️ Features
-
**Optimized Performance:** Includes lightweight client-side performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and ImmediatelyFast to drastically boost frame rates and reduce lag.

**Enhanced Visuals:** The best shader for the latest version.

**Server Friendly:** Designed to work seamlessly on the official LagAttack server—no unfair advantages, just pure performance and beauty.
